title: Zuri's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Little Zuri plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers, butterflies, leaves, and snow in her magical garden.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Spring is here! Where are the flowers hiding?

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, crouching behind a large tree in a spring garden with pastel pink and yellow flowers blooming, her hands covering her eyes in a peek-a-boo gesture
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo behind a tree in spring

pages.text: There they are! Pretty pink and yellow flowers dancing in the breeze.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, standing with arms outstretched among blooming spring flowers in soft pastels, smiling with delight

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Summer sun! Where are the butterflies hiding?

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking from behind bright summer sunflowers in vibrant yellows and oranges, hands positioned over her eyes
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind sunflowers in summer

pages.text: There they are! Orange and blue butterflies flying all around!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, reaching up toward colorful butterflies in a bright summer garden filled with vivid flowers and green leaves
illustration.alt: Zuri reaching for butterflies in summer

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Fall is here! Where are the leaves hiding?

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind an autumn tree with warm orange and red leaves, playing peek-a-boo in the golden fall light

pages.text: There they are! Red and orange leaves falling down like magic!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, dancing among falling autumn leaves in warm reds, oranges, and golds swirling around her
illustration.alt: Zuri dancing in falling autumn leaves

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Winter snow! Where are the snowflakes hiding?

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking around a snow-covered tree in a winter scene with cool blues and whites, snowflakes gently falling
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind snowy tree in winter

pages.text: There they are! White snowflakes dancing down from the sky! Peek-a-boo, seasons!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, spinning in the falling snow with arms wide open, surrounded by gentle white snowflakes in a peaceful winter garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri find in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Zuri finds pretty pink and yellow flowers!

questions.question: What flies around in summer?
questions.explanation: Orange and blue butterflies fly around in summer!

questions.question: What falls down in winter?
questions.explanation: White snowflakes fall down from the sky in winter!
